items.text: · Corporal Smyers, PSP Stonington, joined Troopers Abhaisingh and Myers to visit a new junior Trooper. Giovani, a fifth grader at a local school, dressed up as a Trooper for career day. CPL Smyers had him try on a campaign hat to complete the look.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Milagros Rivera was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.
